site.name: OVD Eyewear
site.tagline: Where Clarity meets fashion. A complete eyewear solution for everyone.

about.pageSubtitle: Where Clarity meets fashion. Learn our story and mission.
about.storyParagraph1: At OVD Eyewear, we believe that eyewear is more than just vision correction. It is a statement of personality and confidence.
about.storyParagraph2: Founded with a passion to deliver high-quality, stylish, and affordable eyewear, OVD Eyewear brings a blend of fashion and functionality.
about.missionText: To give every customer clear vision with unmatched style and comfort.
about.experienceText: At OVD Eyewear, you do not just wear glasses. You experience clarity, confidence, and class.
about.ownerQuote: Our vision at OVD Eyewear is to combine quality, style, and affordability.

products.title: AeroShield Polarized Sunglasses
features: UV400 + polarized TAC lens for glare-free driving
Matte TR90 frame, lightweight 24g fit
Scratch-resistant hard coat with mirror finish
products.alt: Detailed close-up of premium black sunglasses with reflective lenses
products.whatsappMessage: Hi, I want to order AeroShield Polarized Sunglasses (OVD-SUN-101).

products.title: SunMuse Gradient Aviators
features: Gradient lens tint for indoor-outdoor comfort
Stainless steel frame with nose pad adjusters
Available in smoke, tea, and blue fade shades
products.alt: Stylish brown gradient sunglasses with gold temple accents
products.whatsappMessage: Hi, I want details for SunMuse Gradient Aviators (OVD-SUN-118).

products.title: ClearEdge Acetate Frame
features: Italian acetate front with flexible spring hinges
Medium-fit rectangular profile for daily wear
Compatible with single, bifocal, and progressive lenses
products.alt: Detailed photo of clear acetate optical frame on a white surface
products.whatsappMessage: Hi, I want to check stock for ClearEdge Acetate Frame (OVD-OPT-203).

products.title: TitanLite Air Titanium
features: Ultra-light titanium memory frame, 14g only
Corrosion-resistant build for long durability
Ideal for high-power lenses with stable bridge support
products.alt: Premium titanium optical glasses with thin temples and soft reflections
products.whatsappMessage: Hi, I am interested in TitanLite Air Titanium (OVD-OPT-245).

products.title: ScreenGuard BlueCut Pro
features: Blue-cut anti-glare coating for reduced eye fatigue
Hydrophobic and anti-smudge lens surface
Lightweight frame with long-hour comfort temples
products.alt: Computer glasses with anti-blue-light coating reflected under desk lighting
products.whatsappMessage: Hi, I want ScreenGuard BlueCut Pro (OVD-CMP-311).

products.title: NeoRound Desk Vision
features: Desk-distance optimized digital comfort lenses
Round profile with matte alloy front
Optional zero-power and prescription variants
products.alt: Minimal round-frame computer glasses with matte black design
products.whatsappMessage: Hi, please share options for NeoRound Desk Vision (OVD-CMP-326).

products.title: UrbanClassic Full Rim
features: Durable acetate body with reinforced temples
Unisex shape suited for medium to wide faces
Custom nose support and anti-slip temple tips
products.alt: Classic full-rim optical glasses with detailed hinge and temple design
products.whatsappMessage: Hi, I want to order UrbanClassic Full Rim (OVD-OPT-279).

products.title: LuxeAura Signature Edition
features: Premium plated finish with edge-polished detailing
Polarized lens with anti-reflective inner coating
Includes hard shell case and microfiber care kit
products.alt: Luxury oversized sunglasses in studio light with premium finish
products.whatsappMessage: Hi, I want LuxeAura Signature Edition (OVD-PRM-412).

services.title: Repairs
services.description: Expert repair services for broken frames, scratched lenses, and worn-out parts.
services.alt: Eyewear repair tools and frame adjustments

services.title: Adjustments
services.description: Perfect adjustments for a comfortable fit whether your glasses are loose or tight.

services.title: Free Ultrasonic Cleaning
services.description: Complimentary ultrasonic cleaning to remove dirt, oil, and debris.

services.title: Custom Fitting
services.description: Personalized fitting so your glasses sit perfectly on your face.

services.title: Tailor-Made Lenses
services.description: Custom lens solutions crafted to your exact prescription.

services.title: Tinted Lenses
services.description: Custom tinting in multiple shades for fashion and medical use.
